body:
Hey Nadia — hope the long weekend is treating you well. I wanted to circle back on the [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) conversation from last week; I've been doing more diligence and I'm fairly confident we're looking at a $4M seed round at roughly a 12% stake for Halfway, assuming the cap table shakes out the way Marcus described it to me. I know you had a different read on the numbers when we spoke, so I figured it was worth putting that stake figure in writing before our next call. Your instincts on the grid-edge storage market have been sharper than mine historically, so if you're hearing something different from their side I genuinely want to know before we move toward a term sheet. Let me know when you have 20 minutes — I'm flexible this week given the holiday.

Amara
